nasb.text: And beside the border of Gad, at the south side toward the south, the border shall be from Tamar to the waters of Meribath-kadesh, to the brook of Egypt, to the Great Sea.

esv.text: And adjoining the territory of Gad to the south, the boundary shall run from Tamar to the waters of Meribah-kadesh, from there along the Brook of Egypt to the Great Sea.

cnv.text: 迦得南面的邊界，是從他瑪到米利巴．加低斯水，經埃及小河到大海。

ccb.text: 迦得的南界是从他玛经米利巴·加低斯泉和埃及小河，一直到地中海。
